metadata.title: Print
metadata.description: Print notes and documents directly from your workspace.

regex.source: Notice("Default styling could not be located.")
Notice("Could not find the plugin path. No default print styles will be added.")
regex.target: Notice("找不到插件路径。不会添加默认打印样式")

regex.source: Notice("No markdown files found in the folder.")
regex.target: Notice("文件夹中未找到 markdown 文件")
name:"当前文件夹中的所有笔记"

regex.source: .setDesc("Include the note title in the printout.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在打印输出中包含注释标题")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the font size for the printed note.")
.setDesc("When printing a folder, combine all notes into a single document. If disabled, each note will start on a new page.")
regex.target: .setDesc("打印文件夹时，将所有注释合并到单个文档中。如果禁用，则每个注释将从新页面开始")

regex.source: .setDesc("Enable this option to interpret horizontal lines (---) as page breaks ")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用此选项可将水平线 (---) 解释为分页符")

regex.source: .setDesc("Enable debug mode. This will open the print window for inspection.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用调试模式。这将打开打印窗口以供检查")

regex.source: .setDesc("You can add custom print styles by adding a `print.css` snippet. The print window's body uses the `obsidian-print` class, so you can prefix your custom print styles accordingly.")
regex.target: .setDesc("您可以通过添加 `print.css` 代码片段来添加自定义打印样式。打印窗口的主体使用 `obsidian-print` 类，因此您可以相应地为自定义打印样式添加前缀")
